sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id Int32, values Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_array VALUES (1, [1, 2, NULL, NULL]), (2, [3, 1, 1, 4]), (3, [NULL, NULL, NULL]);
SELECT id, countEqual(values, 1) AS count_of_ones FROM test_array;
UPDATE test_array SET values = arrayConcat(values, [1]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, countEqual(values, NULL) AS count_of_nulls FROM test_array;
